products.name: Veronte Autopilot 1x
products.descriptor: Miniaturized fail-safe autopilot with sensor redundancy for drones and eVTOLs

evidence.snippet:
Autopilot 1x
============
SAIL I-IV | Fail-Safe
---------------------
Miniaturized flight control system for drones, eVTOLs, and autonomous vehicles. Developed in accordance with avionics certification standards DO-178C (ED-12), DO-254 (ED-80), and DO-160. It integrates sensors, 4G BLOS communications, and Remote ID / ADS-B
[Manual](https://manuals.embention.com/1x/en/latest/index.html) [Datasheet](https://www.embention.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/Veronte-Autopilot-1x-4.12-ENG-Datasheet.pdf) [3D Model](#model3d) [Service Bulletin](https://www.embention.com/service-publications/)

Veronte Autopilot 1x Integration KIT Developer KIT

products.name: Veronte Autopilot 4x
products.descriptor: Fail-operational redundant autopilot for certified eVTOL and large UAVs

evidence.snippet:
Autopilot 4x
============
SAIL I-VI & TC | Fail-Operational
---------------------------------
Redundant control system for drones and eVTOL requiring certification or safety-critical operations. Developed under DO-178C, DO-254 and DO-160G standards, with a fail-operational architecture and no single point of failure.

products.name: Autopilot KAI
products.descriptor: High-integrity AI autopilot with embedded neural engine and 4G BLOS for tactical and industrial missions

evidence.snippet:
Autopilot KAI
=============
High-Integrity | Kinetic with AI
--------------------------------
**High-performance flight control system with embedded AI for tactical, industrial operations.** Developed to ensure maximum robustness in complex environments, it integrates neural processing, 4G BLOS communications, and safety-critical computing.
[Datasheet](https://www.embention.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Veronte-Autopilot-KAI-2.0-ENG-Datasheet.pdf) [Service Bulletin](https://www.embention.com/service-publications/)

Veronte Autopilot KAI

KAI 2.0

\* Pricing shown is valid for orders fulfilled by Embention UAE. For mid-range volume discounts or inquiries regarding Spain and the USA, please contact our sales team.

Absolutely. At Embention, we are committed to providing the highest levels of security and reliability for the UAV and eVTOL industry. The Veronte ecosystem is fully developed in compliance with NDAA Section 889 and Section 848.

products.name: Veronte Autopilot DRx
products.descriptor: Distributed redundant autopilot for fly-by-wire eVTOL and UAM certification

evidence.snippet:
Autopilot DRx
=============
SAIL I-VI & TC | Distributed Redundant
--------------------------------------
Designed to meet eVTOL certification requirements (DO178C / ED-12, DO254 / ED 80, and DO160) this Distributed Redundant Autopilot is the only flight controller for fly-by-wire and autonomous control “Ready To Fly” any eVTOL aircraft for UAM
[Manual](https://manuals.embention.com/1x/en/latest/index.html) [Datasheet](https://www.embention.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/Veronte-Autopilot-DRX-ENG-Datasheet_LR_Web.pdf) [3D Model](#model3d) [Service Bulletin](https://www.embention.com/service-publications/)

products.name: KAI for Loitering Munition
products.descriptor: KAI autopilot variant configured as flight control system for loitering munitions with vision-based terminal guidance

evidence.snippet:
FCS for Loitering Munitions.
### [Autopilot LM](https://www.embention.com/veronte-ecosystem/autopilots/loitering-munition/)
Cutting-edge autopilot system tailored for Loitering Munitions. This cost-effective solution combines flight control with advanced computer vision technology, enabling precise navigation and target tracking even in GNSS-denied operations.

products.name: KAI for C-UAS
products.descriptor: KAI autopilot variant for high-speed counter-UAS intercept with AI-driven signature tracking and high-G logic

evidence.snippet: *   [KAI for C-UASHigh-Speed Neutralization](https://www.embention.com/veronte-ecosystem/autopilots/kai-for-c-uas/)

*   #### Counter UAS
    Tactical engagement is optimized through lead-pursuit calculation, including radar-slaved guidance and high-G intercept logic, ensuring the identification of agile threats. Final maneuvers include AI-driven signature tracking to ensure precise collision and eliminate potential escape during high-speed engagement.
*   #### Industrial

Absolutely. At Embention, we are committed to providing the highest levels of security and reliability for the UAV and eVTOL industry. The Veronte ecosystem is fully developed in compliance with NDAA Section 889 and Section 848.

evidence.snippet:

C-UAS | High-Speed Neutralization

RS232 LOS Datalink for drones
-----------------------------
Reliable line-of-sight datalink operating at 400MHz, 900MHz or 2.4GHz. It enables wireless communication through an RS232 port for both point-to-point and point-to-multipoint setups, housed in a rugged, waterproof aluminum enclosure.

evidence.snippet:
Avionics XDL24
==============
Robust datalink based on XBee 3

products.name: Motor Controller MC01
products.descriptor: Small brushless/stepper motor controller for gimbal and tracking precision applications

evidence.snippet:
Motor Controller MC01
=====================
Gimbal & Tracker Motor Controller
---------------------------------
Small brushless / stepper motor controller, in particular an ESC for critical actuator control, which can be controlled via PWM, CAN or I2C interfaces. It is used to control motors for precision applications like gimbal cameras or tracking systems.
[Manual](https://manuals.embention.com/mc01/en/latest/index.html) [Datasheet](https://www.embention.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/Veronte-Motor-Controller-MC01-Datasheet.pdf) [3D Model](#model3d) [Service Bulletin](https://www.embention.com/service-publications/)

products.name: Motor Controller MC110
products.descriptor: 110 kW / 800 V liquid-cooled eVTOL motor inverter with DO-178C/254 certification

evidence.snippet:
Motor Controller MC110
======================
Designed for eVTOL and Drones
-----------------------------
Motor inverter for eVTOL, capable of supporting voltages up to 800V and currents up to 200A, designed for controlling both sensored and sensorless electric motors. It complies with aviation standards DO-178C and DO-254, ensuring safety and reliability.
